summary: V53.2 Resonance Camera Feature Test - PASSED. Verified the new capture pipeline UI that records ParticleField canvas + MixerContext audio. All data-testids present: resonance-camera, resonance-record, particle-field (CANVAS element with forwardRef). All 10 mixer tabs work correctly. Multi-route regression passed on /breathing, /meditation, /oracle, /frequencies. Account panel shows correct guest/logged-in states.
critical_code_review_comments: ResonanceCamera.js correctly implements Record/Stop/Download/Share/Discard UI with proper data-testids
ParticleField.js uses forwardRef + useImperativeHandle to expose canvas via getCanvas() method for capture pipeline
useResonanceCapture.js implements canvas.captureStream(30fps) + MediaStreamAudioDestinationNode muxing correctly
UnifiedCreatorConsole.js properly passes particleFieldRef to ParticleField and resonanceCapture to ResonanceCamera
context_for_next_testing_agent: V53.2 Resonance Camera feature verified. The capture pipeline at /app/frontend/src/components/console/useResonanceCapture.js records ParticleField canvas (30fps) + MixerContext audio into WebM. UI at /app/frontend/src/components/console/ResonanceCamera.js shows Record/Stop/Download/Share/Discard controls. Note: Actual recording cannot be tested in headless browser (MediaRecorder needs user interaction), but UI renders correctly and all data-testids are present. ParticleField now uses forwardRef to expose canvas for capture.
